// NOTE: The following line is auto-generated by Atomic — do not edit this line!
// @atomic route=post:{{NAME}} auth={{AUTH}} env=.env

package main

import (
	"net/http"
)

type RequestBody struct {
	Test string `json:"test"`
}

func {{METHOD_UPPER}}{{NAME_UPPER}}(requestBody RequestBody) (statusCode int, message string, payload interface{}) {
	if requestBody.Test == "" {
		return http.StatusBadRequest,
			"Bad Request",
			map[string]string{
				"error": "test field is required",
			}
	}

	return http.StatusCreated,
		"Created",
		map[string]string{
			"created": "true",
		}
}
